title: lepidonia callilepis
intro: Lepidonia callilepis, also known as False Thyme, is a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its essential oils. The health benefits of Lepidonia callilepis include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce stress and anxiety. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
